title: Authenticated users can persist arbitrary web push endpoints that the web-push reminder cron later requests with service-role context

affected_locations.label: source
affected_locations.detail: RLS lets authenticated users manage their own web_push_subscriptions rows, including endpoint/p256dh/auth/timezone.

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: Table defines endpoint as unconstrained text.

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: Cron-secret-gated service-role function reads stored subscriptions.

dedupe_reason: Kept separate from HABB-W02-002 because this is a distinct scheduled function and sink with different trigger/precondition set.

title: Coach push cron reuses user-controlled web push endpoints for outbound sends without destination validation

affected_locations.label: source
affected_locations.detail: Authenticated users can manage their own web_push_subscriptions rows.

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: endpoint is text and there is no DB destination constraint.

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: Cron-secret-gated service-role function reads stored subscriptions after feature flag check.

dedupe_reason: Kept separate from HABB-W02-001 because coach-push is independently reachable and gated by a different scheduled job/feature flag.
